Off Calendar Jul-05-2022 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Final Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Jul-05-2022 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Jun-23-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Richard McKannay, Jr., via CourtCall, in propria persona, Petitioner; Codi Dada, via ZOOM, specially appearing with Petitioner.

Mr. Dada at the outset advises the court that he has been retained by Mr. McKannay to assist with the estate and that he is confident in Mr. McKannay's ability to serve as Administrator with his assistance. The court and Mr. McKannay then discuss the significant difference in the estimated value of the property of the estate shown in the initial petition and the amended petition. Mr. McKannay reports that he had been working with a paralegal who assisted with the amended petition and that the paralegal may have shown the reassessed value of the real property in the amended petition.

After additional discussion, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration. Richard H. McKannay, Jr., is appointed Administrator with full authority. Bond is not required. Michael Kasolas is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on Close of Estate and Status on Filing of Final Inventory and Appraisal are set for July 5, 2022, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: D. Johnson. Not reported.
